name: pos-user-management
description: User management module for POS system with role-based access control and PIN authentication
author: POS System

requirePinForSettings.description: Require PIN authentication to access settings

lockSettingsByRole.description: Lock settings based on user role

defaultPin.description: Default PIN to use when user hasn't set up their own PIN

inactivityTimeout.description: Inactivity timeout in seconds before lock screen appears
